Because we get this a lot We have a client has this laundry list of information that they want to collect Well, maybe you don't need all of that right now Maybe you just need a couple of those things and then once you email them you can collect more to go to that next step Facebook doesn't want you to use pop-ups on your landing page So that doesn't mean you can't have pop-ups on your website But if you're on a page, which is your typical landing page is a page where you can't exit that page Meaning there's there's no other navigation to other other points of the website So like a blog post for example There's navigation to go anywhere else within the website your typical landing page doesn't have that So if there's no navigation out and you throw a pop-up on that Facebook may not like that Also avoid language that violates Facebook terms Obviously, but all these things are going to impact your success
